eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Imperial; San Diego, CA; at 10:03 PM ON APR 11, 2026 Effective until 12:03 AM APR 12, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AN AMBER ALERT IS BEING ISSUED BY THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL ON BEHALF OF THE FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION.

ON APRIL 10, 2026, AT 7:03 PM DANIEL EDUARDO GARCIA ALVARES WAS ABDUCTED FROM MEXICALI, MEXICO.  GARCIA ALVARES IS A 2-YEAR-OLD HISPANIC MALE, 2 FEET 3 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING 30 POUNDS, WITH BROWN HAIR, AND BROWN EYES. GARCIA-ALVARES CLOTHING IS UNKNOWN.

THE SUSPECT SELINA ALVAREZ PRADO IS A 32-YEAR-OLD HISPANIC FEMALE, STANDING 5 FEET 1 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING 162 POUNDS, WITH AUBURN HAIR, AND BROWN EYES.  ALVAREZ PRADO CLOTHING IS UNKNOWN

THE SUSPECT IS BELIEVED TO BE DRIVING A WHITE 2018 HONDA ACCORD WITH A CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE, CA - 9NMG031. THE SUSPECT MAY ALSO BE DRIVING A WHITE 2015 HYUNDAI SONATA WITH A CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE, CA - 9GTE354.

IF SEEN CALL 9 1 1
